descriptions.text: Eight fighters are searching find eight crystal for a legendary being named Lemuria to grant them a single wish, any which they desire. They will have to defeat the others as well to reach their goal and discover the legend of Lemuria!

AbalaBurn: A Battle Legend of Astterica (Japanese: アバラバーン) is a 3D fighting adventure video game for the PlayStation developed by Tamsoft and published by Takara, the same team behind the Battle Arena Toshinden series. It includes fighting, beat 'em up and platform elements.
